description_long: This object depicts an adult human figure engaged in an aerial silk performance, suspended by two long, draped fabric bands. The person is holding onto the silks with both hands above their head, while their body is extended downward, legs bent at the knees and feet pointed outward. The figure wears a fitted, athletic outfit with a top and pants, and black shoes. The facial features are visible, and the hair is styled short and neat. The silks are visually prominent, stretching diagonally upward and supporting the figure's weight. The overall form is dynamic, capturing the tension and grace of aerial acrobatics.
description: An adult performing an aerial silk pose, suspended by long fabric bands, wearing athletic clothing and black shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person's face, both hands gripping the silks, and the body extended downward with bent knees.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the extended arms, and the draped silks supporting the body.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head, the alignment of the body, and the silks extending upward from both hands.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the side profile, bent legs, and the way the silks are held and support the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic performance wear with fitted top and pants
attribute_posture: suspended in an aerial pose with arms extended upward and knees bent
